summary: Diff adds a new SettingsPopup component and updates Header to include a Settings (gear) button with popup state management. However, due to truncation, key acceptance-criteria details for the Privacy Policy link (exact label, URL, target/rel) and popup dismissal behavior cannot be confirmed from the provided diff summary. Some additional, non-requested metadata/doc updates and extra logic (e.g., multilingual label heuristics) were introduced.

missing_requirements.requirement: The settings popup/panel must contain a "Privacy Policy" link labeled exactly "Privacy Policy" that opens https://sites.google.com/view/frequencyverseapp/privacy-policy in a new tab/window with target=_blank and rel="noopener noreferrer".
missing_requirements.reason: SettingsPopup.tsx is truncated before showing the popup content/link markup, so the exact label text, URL, and anchor attributes cannot be verified from the diff summary.

missing_requirements.requirement: The popup/panel can be dismissed (e.g., tapping outside or pressing a close action) without breaking existing Theme/Language popups.
missing_requirements.reason: The diff shows Escape-key handling in SettingsPopup, but does not show any outside-click dismissal or close-button wiring (component is truncated), so full dismissal behavior cannot be confirmed.

hallucinated_features.description: Added project metadata/state tracking updates (new_feature_requests, projectStateVersion changes) unrelated to the UI requirements.
hallucinated_features.reason: BuildRequest only asks for UI behavior in header/popup/footer; it does not request updating project_state.json.

hallucinated_features.description: Introduced a complex multilingual heuristic for determining button labels based on substring checks of t.subtitle, and DOM querying for settings button by matching aria-label in multiple languages.
hallucinated_features.reason: BuildRequest does not require multilingual label inference logic or DOM querying by aria-label across languages; it only requires a Settings button and popup behavior.

hallucinated_features.description: Updated/added a documentation-style file summarizing many frontend files/features not part of this request.
hallucinated_features.reason: BuildRequest does not ask for generating or modifying a repository-wide frontend file summary.
